variables.error_description: Inference latency spiked from 200ms p95 to 4.5s p95 starting at 14:30 UTC. No deployment changes in the last 24 hours. GPU utilization jumped from 60% to 98%. Request volume is stable at ~50 req/s.
variables.context: Ollama serving qwen2.5:14b on Apple Silicon M4 Max. Model was running fine for 3 days. Other models on the same instance are also slow.

variables.error_description: Model returns empty string responses for approximately 15% of requests. Affected requests have no error in logs. Response status is 200 with an empty choices array. Other requests work normally with the same model.
variables.context: Using OpenAI-compatible API via Ollama. Temperature 0.7, max_tokens 2048. The empty responses seem correlated with longer input prompts (>3000 tokens).

variables.error_description: Fine-tuning loss plateaued at 1.82 after epoch 2 and has not decreased through epochs 3-8. Validation loss started increasing at epoch 4 (1.85 -> 2.1). Learning rate is 2e-5 with cosine schedule.
variables.context: Fine-tuning a 7B parameter model on 3,000 instruction pairs using LoRA (r=16, alpha=32). Training on 1x A100 40GB. Dataset was deduplicated and cleaned.

variables.error_description: MLflow experiment logging fails silently. mlflow.log_metric() calls return without error but metrics don't appear in the UI. mlflow.start_run() succeeds and returns a valid run_id. The MLflow tracking server is reachable via curl.
variables.context: MLflow 3.x deployed in k3d cluster, genai namespace. Tracking URI is http://genai-mlflow.genai.svc.cluster.local:5000. Client running in a separate pod in the same namespace. Security middleware is disabled.

variables.error_description: Production model accuracy dropped from 89% to 71% over 2 weeks. No model changes deployed. Input feature distributions show the 'category' field has 3 new values not seen in training data. Numerical features show increased variance.
variables.context: Classification model serving e-commerce product categorization. Training data is 6 months old. Model is retrained monthly but the last retrain was 5 weeks ago due to pipeline failure.
